docs: Metric comparison settings for champion/challenger model promotion. Positive weight = new model must be X% better. Negative weight = new model can be X% worse and still promote.

RMSE.description: New model RMSE must be at least 30% lower to promote on this metric

R2.description: New model R2 can be up to 50% worse and still promote (if other metrics pass)

Spearman_Correlation.description: New model Spearman can be up to 30% worse and still promote
